info.description: This is the FAIMS Conductor server API documentation.
info.title: FAIMS3 API

tags.name: Records
tags.description: Notebook record metadata and full-record reads; mutating routes are omitted from this spec until records CRUD is enabled in the API.

UnauthorizedError.description: Access token is missing or invalid

get.description: Return a hello message as JSON
Provides details of the server such as name and description

get.summary: List notebooks visible to the caller (directory)
get.description: Returns project (notebook) documents from the directory that the authenticated user may read metadata for (`LIST_PROJECTS`). By default, notebooks with status `ARCHIVED` are omitted; pass `includeArchived=true` to include them.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: When `true`, includes archived notebooks. Default excludes `ARCHIVED`.

get.description: Returns notebooks (projects) the caller can access. Optional `teamId` filters by team. By default, notebooks with status `ARCHIVED` are omitted; pass `includeArchived=true` to include archived notebooks alongside others.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: When set, restrict to notebooks owned by this team

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: When `true`, includes notebooks with status `ARCHIVED`. Default excludes them.

post.description: Creates a notebook (project) in the projects DB. Supply either `uiSpecification` (from scratch) or `template_id` (from template), not both. Optional `description` (max 250 characters) and `teamId` for team-owned surveys. Requires `CREATE_PROJECT` or `CREATE_PROJECT_IN_TEAM` as appropriate.

get.description: Returns the full projects DB document for the notebook, including inlined `uiSpecification` (design bundle with `uiSpec` and `metadata`). Adds `recordCount` when records can be counted. Surveys not migrated to projects DB v4 return 404.

404.description: Notebook not found or not migrated

put.description: Merges inconsequential root fields (`name`, `description`) on the project document. Does not change `uiSpecification`; use `PUT /notebooks/{id}/uiSpecification` for the design bundle. Team ownership uses `PUT /notebooks/{id}/team`. Requires `UPDATE_PROJECT_DETAILS` on the project.

Full replace of the design bundle (`uiSpec` + `metadata`). Accepts current NotebookDefinition JSON at the request root (not wrapped in a `uiSpecification` property) or legacy wire JSON that the server migrates. Requires `UPDATE_PROJECT_UISPEC` on the project. Returns the updated project document.
Updates which team owns the notebook (`ownedByTeamId`). Requires `CHANGE_PROJECT_TEAM` on the project. Returns 200 with no body.

Sets survey status to `OPEN`, `CLOSED`, or `ARCHIVED`. This endpoint replaces the removed `PUT /notebooks/{id}/archive` and `POST /notebooks/{id}/restore` routes: use `ARCHIVED` to archive and `CLOSED` to restore from archive. **Permissions:** transitions between open and closed (while not archived) require `CHANGE_PROJECT_STATUS`. Setting `ARCHIVED`, or changing `ARCHIVED` → `CLOSED`, requires `CHANGE_PROJECT_ARCHIVE_STATUS`. Idempotent: requesting the current status returns 200 with no document change. **Validation:** `OPEN` is rejected while the notebook is `ARCHIVED`; set `CLOSED` first.

200.description: Status updated (including no-op when already at the requested status)

400.description: Invalid transition (e.g. requesting OPEN while archived)

403.description: Caller lacks the permission required for this transition

post.description: Irreversibly removes CouchDB project databases, invites, and people-db project roles for this notebook. The notebook must already be archived; requires operations-level permission. Request body must include `confirmName` exactly matching the notebook name (trimmed).

400.description: Confirmation name does not match, or notebook not in a state that allows deletion

get.summary: List all records (legacy full export shape)
get.description: Returns `{ records }` with full export-oriented payloads for every record in the notebook (internal regex listing). Requires export permission on the project. Related-record fields omit references to soft-deleted records when building the export payload. For paginated, permission-filtered **metadata** only, use GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/metadata` instead. For single-record CRUD, use GET `/notebooks/{id}/records/{recordId}`.
Paginated metadata for records the caller may read (filters, soft-delete handling). For legacy export-shaped data use GET /notebooks/{id}/records instead.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Restrict to records for this form / viewset id

parameters.name: startKey
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response’s nextStartKey

parameters.name: filterDeleted
parameters.description: When false, include soft-deleted records (default true)

get.description: Full form data for one record; optional revisionId. PUT and DELETE are omitted while CRUD mutations are disabled.

parameters.name: revisionId
parameters.description: Specific revision to load (defaults to current head)

403.description: Not allowed to read this record

get.summary: Request signed URL for notebook records export
get.description: Builds a short-lived signed JWT and returns a JSON object with an absolute URL to `GET /notebooks/download/{token}`. Supports CSV, ZIP, GeoJSON, KML, and FULL (multi-part ZIP). CSV requires viewID. For format=full, optional boolean query flags (default true) select which parts are included: includeTabular, includeAttachments, includeGeoJSON, includeKML, includeMetadata.

parameters.name: viewID
parameters.description: Form/view identifier (required for CSV; optional for ZIP when scoping attachments)

parameters.name: includeTabular
parameters.description: When format is full: include tabular CSV exports (default true)

parameters.name: includeAttachments
parameters.description: When format is full: include attachment ZIP (default true)

parameters.name: includeGeoJSON
parameters.description: When format is full: include GeoJSON (default true)

parameters.name: includeKML
parameters.description: When format is full: include KML (default true)

parameters.name: includeMetadata
parameters.description: When format is full: include metadata (default true)

200.description: Signed download URL (token expires in a few minutes)

get.summary: Generate download token for notebook records (deprecated)
get.description: DEPRECATED: Use /notebooks/{id}/records/export instead. Generates a signed JWT token and redirects to download endpoint for exporting notebook records in CSV or ZIP format.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format (only CSV and ZIP supported in this deprecated route)

302.description: Redirect to download endpoint with JWT token

get.summary: Download notebook records using JWT token
get.description: Downloads notebook records in the format specified by the JWT token. Token expires in 5 minutes. Supports CSV, ZIP, GeoJSON, and KML formats.

parameters.name: downloadToken
parameters.description: Signed JWT download token containing download parameters (projectID, format, viewID, userID)

application/zip.example: ZIP archive containing photos and attachments

application/geo+json.example: GeoJSON file with geospatial notebook data

Content-Disposition.description: Attachment filename based on export label and format

400.description: Invalid token or missing required parameters

get.description: Returns roles and users who may be assigned for this notebook. Disabled user accounts are omitted from the selectable user list.

post.summary: Add a user to a notebook
post.description: Add or remove a project role for a user (`addrole`). Project roles cannot be assigned to disabled user accounts.

403.description: Not allowed (e.g. assigning a role to a disabled account)

get.description: Returns people-db user documents (sanitized) for admins with `VIEW_USER_LIST`. Disabled accounts are omitted by default; pass `includeArchived=true` to include users with `disabled: true`.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: When `true`, includes disabled user accounts in the list.

post.description: Sets `disabled: true` on the target user. Cannot disable yourself or a cluster admin. Requires `DISABLE_USER_ACCOUNT` on the target user id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User id or email identifying the account

post.description: Sets `disabled: false` on the target user. Requires `ENABLE_USER_ACCOUNT` on the target user id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User id or email identifying the account

post.summary: Set server admin status for a user
post.description: Set server cluster-admin status for a user. Requires cluster-admin role. Disabled accounts cannot have global roles changed until they are re-enabled.

get.description: Lists template summaries (no `uiSpecification` form payload in each row). Use GET `/api/templates/{id}` for full detail including the form. By default only non-archived templates are returned. Pass `includeArchived=true` to list archived templates (still subject to `READ_TEMPLATE_DETAILS`). Optional `teamId` scopes to a team. Each item may include `ownedByTeamDisplayName` when the template has `ownedByTeamId` and the server can resolve the team — so clients can show the owning team name without calling the teams API (e.g. for public catalogue templates).

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: When set, only templates associated with this team

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: When `true`, returns archived templates only; when omitted or `false`, returns non-archived templates only.

post.description: Creates a new template. The payload is validated before processing. Requires `CREATE_TEMPLATE` or `CREATE_TEMPLATE_IN_TEAM` as appropriate. Setting `isPublic` to true additionally requires `CREATE_PUBLIC_TEMPLATE` (operations or system administrators), same grant as `CHANGE_TEMPLATE_VISIBILITY`.

get.description: Gets a specific template by ID from the templates DB. The response may include `ownedByTeamDisplayName` when the template has `ownedByTeamId` and the server can resolve the team (same behaviour as the list endpoint).

put.description: Updates an existing template (name and/or description). The payload is validated before processing. Requires `UPDATE_TEMPLATE_DETAILS` on the template resource. Team ownership uses `PUT /templates/{id}/team`.
Updates which team owns the template (`ownedByTeamId`). Requires `CHANGE_TEMPLATE_TEAM` on the template resource. Returns the updated template document.

Full replace of the design bundle (`uiSpec` + `metadata`). Accepts current NotebookDefinition JSON at the request root (not wrapped in a `uiSpecification` property) or legacy wire JSON that the server migrates. Requires `UPDATE_TEMPLATE_DETAILS` on the template. Returns the updated template document.

Sets whether the template is listed in the public catalogue (`isPublic`). Does not change other template fields. Requires `CHANGE_TEMPLATE_VISIBILITY` (operations or system administrators). Returns the updated template document.

get.description: Returns how many notebooks (projects) still reference this template id. Requires `READ_TEMPLATE_DETAILS` on the template.

put.description: Sets the template’s top-level `archived` flag. Use `{ "archive": true }` to archive and `{ "archive": false }` to restore from archive (replaces removed `POST /templates/{id}/restore`). Restore is rejected unless the template is currently archived. Requires `CHANGE_TEMPLATE_STATUS` on the template.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. restore when not archived)

post.description: Deletes the latest revision of an existing template. The template must already be archived. Requires `DELETE_TEMPLATE` on the template.

get.description: Gets a list of all teams from the teams DB

post.description: Creates a new team. Requires authentication.
Creates a new invite for a project/notebook. Requires appropriate permissions.
Creates a new invite for a team. Requires appropriate permissions.

get.description: Get tokens for the authenticated user or all tokens (admin only)

post.description: Get a new JWT using a refresh token

post.summary: Exchange token for access/refresh token pair

NotebookMeta.description: Notebook list row (see GET /notebooks/). Project document without `uiSpecification`, plus `is_admin`.

is_admin.description: True when the caller has project admin on this notebook

ProjectListItem.description: Stored project (notebook) fields returned in list responses; omits `uiSpecification`.

ProjectDocument.description: Full project document as stored in the projects DB (includes `uiSpecification`).

GetNotebookResponse.description: GET /notebooks/{id} — project document plus optional record count.

PutUpdateNotebookMetadataInput.description: PUT /notebooks/{id} — partial merge of name and/or description.

teamId.description: Team that will own the notebook

NotebookUiSpecificationInput.description: Loose JSON object for create payloads; legacy wire format or current NotebookDefinition (may be wrapped — server normalizes).

NotebookDefinition.description: Inlined design bundle on stored project/template documents.

NotebookDefinitionUpload.description: PUT .../uiSpecification body: NotebookDefinition fields at the JSON root (must not include a nested `uiSpecification` property).

NotebookUiSpec.description: Decoded form model (`fields`, `views`, `viewsets`, `visible_types`) plus settings and schemaVersion.

PossibleConnectionInfo.description: CouchDB connection descriptor for per-project data DB.

confirmName.description: Must match the notebook display name exactly (trimmed)

ProjectNotebookStatus.description: Survey lifecycle status stored on the project (notebook) document

ProjectDirectoryEntry.description: Project (notebook) document as stored in the projects database; fields vary by version.

PeopleUserListItem.description: Sanitized people-db user row from GET /users/

count.description: Number of notebooks whose directory still references this template id

archive.description: When true, archive the template; when false, restore from archive

fieldId.description: Field id on the parent that defines the link

formId.description: Form / viewset id for the new record

createdBy.description: Optional creator user id (defaults to authenticated user)

nextStartKey.description: Present when more results exist; pass as startKey on the next request

update.description: Map of field id → value (and optional annotations) per data-model form update shape

createdBy.description: Optional user id for the new revision (defaults to authenticated user)

RecordsDetailResponse.description: Shape matches GetRecordResponse in @faims3/data-model (revisionId, formId, data, context with hydrated record/revision)

context.description: Includes hrid, record, and revision documents

GetListTemplatesResponse.description: Template list items are lean summaries (no `uiSpecification`) plus optional `ownedByTeamDisplayName` from the server.

isPublic.description: When true, template is visible in the public catalogue (requires CREATE_PUBLIC_TEMPLATE)

teamId.description: Team that will own the template

isPublic.description: When true, the template is included in the public catalogue for users with permission to read public template details.

TemplateApiResponseExtensions.description: Optional fields returned only by GET /templates and GET /templates/{id}. Not persisted on the template document.

ownedByTeamDisplayName.description: Display name of the owning team (`name` from the teams DB), injected when `ownedByTeamId` is set and the team record exists.

TemplateStoredDocument.description: Template as stored in CouchDB (create/update responses).

TemplateDocument.description: Stored template plus optional GET-only fields (e.g. team display name).

archived.description: When true, the template is archived and cannot be used to create new notebooks until restored

isPublic.description: When true, listed in the public template catalogue

PostCreateNotebookFromTemplate.description: Alternate POST /notebooks/ body when creating from a template.

createdBy.description: User ID who created the team

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when team was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when team was last updated

role.description: Role to be assigned to the user

invitedBy.description: User ID who created the invite

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when invite was created

role.description: Role to be assigned to the user in the team

invitedBy.description: User ID who created the invite

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when invite was created

role.description: Role to assign to the invited user

name.description: Name/email of the person being invited

uses.description: Number of times the invite can be used (optional)

userId.description: User ID who owns the token

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when token was created

lastUsed.description: Unix timestamp when token was last used

isActive.description: Whether the token is currently active

refreshToken.description: The refresh token to exchange for a new access token

token.description: Token to exchange (e.g., OAuth token, invite token)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens
